prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年物理类最低位次约6483→6764→5963→5178→5008，整体呈前移趋势（位次数字减小），近3年累计前移约1756名；2025年基准约5008名，为近年最高水 平；本省物理类计划2021年117人、2022年110人、2023年111人、2024年110人、2025年111人；2026年计划110人，较2025年微幅缩招1人，竞争略有加剧。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 211、双一流；软科主榜约第37名（2026年），排名稳定在35–37名区间，属全国顶尖211理工类院校；2025年声誉评价偏正面，投档线稳步 提升，入选国家卓越工程师学院，保研率升至27%；2026年声誉偏负面（实验室安全事件），但整体影响有限；抖音热度一般，'国防七子'标签具吸引力；力学( A)、机械工程(A)、管理科学与工程(A)、航空宇航科学与技术(A-)、控制科学与工程(A-)、信息与通信工程(A-)、软件工程(A-)，7个A-及以上学科，与航空航天、电子信息等招 生专业高度匹配。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域:
航空航天类、电子信息/通信、电气工程等专业热度持续升温或维持高热推荐；计算机类虽降温但仍属推荐；本省物理类考生2021年11. 7万→2025年19.2万持续增长，2026年总考生26.79万，按历史比例估算物理类约20.4万人，较2025年增加约1.15万人（+6%），竞争显著加剧。
7. 【地域因素】南京航空航天大学位于江苏南京，属长三角核心城市，对福建考生有较强地域吸引力；该校在福建招生占比约3–5%，属中等偏上水平。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位 次持续前移趋势、2026年计划微幅缩招、本省物理类考生显著增加（+6%）以及声誉正面、专业热度高等因素，在2025年基准5008名基础上预计竞争进一步加剧；预测最低位次约4 951名，区间4451–5451名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for Physics Category was approximately 6483 → 6764 → 5963 → 5178 → 5008, showing an overall forward trend (decreasing ranking numbers), with a cumulative forward shift of about 1756 places in the last 3 years; the 2025 baseline is about 5008, the highest level in recent years; the provincial Physics Category enrollment plan was 117 in 2021, 110 in 2022, 111 in 2023, 110 in 2024, and 111 in 2025; the 2026 plan is 110, a slight reduction of 1 compared to 2025, intensifying competition slightly.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211, Double First-Class; ranked approximately 37th on the Soft Science main list (2026), stable in the 35–37 range, belonging to the top national 211 science and engineering universities; the 2025 reputation evaluation is relatively positive, with steadily increasing admission scores, selected for the National Excellent Engineer Academy, and the graduate recommendation rate rising to 27%; the 2026 reputation is slightly negative (laboratory safety incident), but the overall impact is limited; Douyin popularity is average, but the 'National Defense Seven Sons' label is attractive; Mechanics (A), Mechanical Engineering (A), Management Science and Engineering (A), Aerospace Science and Technology (A-), Control Science and Engineering (A-), Information and Communication Engineering (A-), Software Engineering (A-), 7 A- and above disciplines, highly matching the enrollment majors such as aerospace, electronic information, etc.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text:
Majors such as Aerospace, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering continue to heat up or maintain high recommendation; Computer Science, though cooling down, is still recommended; the number of Physics Category candidates in the province increased from 117,000 in 2021 to 192,000 in 2025, and the total candidates in 2026 is 267,900, with an estimated Physics Category of about 204,000 based on historical proportions, an increase of about 11,500 (+6%) compared to 2025, significantly intensifying competition.
7. [Regional Factor] Nanjing University of Aeronautics and Astronautics is located in Nanjing, Jiangsu, a core city in the Yangtze River Delta, which has strong regional appeal to Fujian candidates; the university's enrollment proportion in Fujian is about 3–5%, which is above average.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the continuous forward trend of historical rankings, the slight reduction in the 2026 plan, the significant increase in provincial Physics Category candidates (+6%), as well as positive reputation and high major popularity, competition is expected to further intensify based on the 2025 baseline of 5008; the predicted minimum ranking is about 4951, with a range of 4451–5451.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range of 4451–5451, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors, with Tier 1 as a reach and Tier 3 as a safety; if your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit (<4451), you can focus on Tier 1 majors such as Aerospace Chang Kong Innovation Class and Electrical Engineering; if your ranking is near the upper limit (>5451), it is recommended to mainly rely on Tier 3 as a safety.

prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 211、双一流；软科主榜约第37名 （2026年），属全国顶尖211理工类院校，但历史类非该校核心优势；2025年声誉偏正面，但主要涉及理工科领域；2026年声誉偏负面（实验室安全事件），对 历史类报考影响有限；该校A-及以上学科均为理工类，历史类招生专业（英语、日语、行政管理、广播电视学、金融学、会计学）无直接对应优势学科。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 外语类专业热度一般观望；会计/财务/审计推荐；金融/财经/经济分化观望；本省历史类考生2021年7.8万→2025年6.0万总体下降，但2026年总考生26.79万，按 历史比例估算历史类约6.4万人，较2025年增加约0.4万人（+6.7%），竞争略有加剧；南京位于长三角核心城市，对福建考生有 较强地域吸引力。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次后移趋势、2026年计划持平、本省历史类考生小幅增加以及该校历史类非核心优势等因素，在2025年基准2250名基础上预计延续 后移趋势；预测最低位次约2270名，区间1929–2611名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for History Category was approximately 1496 → 1854 → 1811 → 2348 → 2250, showing an overall backward trend (increasing ranking numbers), with a cumulative backward shift of about 439 places in the last 3 years; the 2025 baseline is approximately 2250; the provincial History Category enrollment plan was 3 in 2021, 10 in 2022, 11 in 2023, 14 in 2024, and 14 in 2025; the 2026 plan is 14, unchanged from 2025.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211, Double First-Class; ranked approximately 37th on the Soft Science main list (2026), a top national 211 science and engineering university, but History Category is not its core strength; reputation in 2025 is generally positive, but mainly in science and engineering fields; reputation in 2026 is negative (laboratory safety incident), with limited impact on History Category admissions; all A- and above disciplines are in science and engineering, and History Category majors (English, Japanese, Administrative Management, Radio and Television, Finance, Accounting) have no directly corresponding advantageous disciplines.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Foreign language majors are generally lukewarm; Accounting/Finance/Auditing recommended; Finance/Economics/Commerce are divided and lukewarm; the number of provincial History Category examinees decreased from 78,000 in 2021 to 60,000 in 2025, but total examinees in 2026 are 267,900, with an estimated History Category of about 64,000 based on historical proportion, an increase of about 4,000 (+6.7%) compared to 2025, slightly intensifying competition; Nanjing, located in the core city of the Yangtze River Delta, has strong regional appeal to Fujian examinees.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the backward trend of historical rankings, unchanged 2026 plan, slight increase in provincial History Category examinees, and the university's non-core advantage in History Category, the backward trend is expected to continue based on the 2025 baseline of 2250; the predicted minimum ranking is approximately 2270, with a range of 1929–2611.

- Radio and Television

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: For rankings within the predicted range of 1929–2611, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors, aim for Tier 1 majors, and use Tier 3 majors as safety; for rankings significantly better than the lower limit (<1929), focus on Accounting and Finance; for rankings near the upper limit (>2611), mainly use Tier 3 majors as safety.
